title: Core Provisioning

frontmatter.title: Core Provisioning
frontmatter.description: The certifiable competency of provisioning and activating services on the network core and transport layer — ordered, dependency-aware, and recoverable operations expressed as safe DOIL intents.

body:
# Skill · Core Provisioning

An operations competency: the agent can provision and activate services on the network core and
transport layer in the correct order, validate dependencies, recover from partial failures, and
predict subscriber-facing impact — all as well-formed, risk-aware DOIL intents.

## Conferred by
- [NETOPS-210](../schools/network-operations/departments/core-provisioning/courses/netops-210.md)
- [NETOPS-220](../schools/network-operations/departments/transport/courses/netops-220.md)

## Examined by
[Network Operations Exam](../benchmarks/netops-exam.md).

## Maps to certification
Required for [Network Operations — Silver](../certifications/network-operations-silver.md). Exercises
the same four-layer evaluation, with emphasis on ordering, rollback, and anticipated impact.
